Formula / how it is calculated: r between reconstructed and observed feature values
cos = (a·b)/(||a|| ||b||) of reconstructed vs observed feature vectors
Mean 1-NN distance (z-scored coords) within each cluster; lower = more contiguous
Fraction of spots where > half of k spatial neighbours have a different label
I = (N/W) Σ_i Σ_j w_ij (x_i-x̄)(x_j-x̄) / Σ_i (x_i-x̄)²
Reference (definition paper / DOI): Moran 1950, Biometrika 37:17-23; Yuan et al. 2024, Nat Methods 21:712-722

Formula / how it is calculated: C = ((N-1) Σ_i Σ_j w_ij (x_i-x_j)²) / (2W Σ_i (x_i-x̄)²)
Reference (definition paper / DOI): Geary 1954, Incorp Statist 5:115-145; Yuan et al. 2024, Nat Methods 21:712-722

Formula / how it is calculated: Per gene: max(class mean / global mean); averaged across markers
L2 logistic regression; accuracy on held-out test split
Mean MI(feature; label) = ΣΣ p(x,y) log[p(x,y)/(p(x)p(y))]
ARI = (RI - E[RI]) / (max RI - E[RI])
NMI = I(U;V) / mean(H(U),H(V))
Tools / packages (Python | R): scIB; scikit-learn; SDMBench  |  aricode; igraph (compare); clevr

Formula / how it is calculated: s(i) = (b(i)-a(i)) / max(a(i),b(i)); normalised (ASW+1)/2
Graph cLISI = (C - mean LISI)/(C-1); LISI = 1/Σ_c p_c²
Cell-type ASW restricted to rare labels (count ≤ median)
1 - |silhouette on batch labels|, averaged within each cell-type
Rejection rate of χ² test: local vs global batch proportions in k-NN sets
Inverse Simpson on batch labels: 1/Σ_b p_b²
Mean over labels of (largest connected component / label size) in k-NN graph
Spearman ρ of pseudotime before vs after integration
AMI = (MI-E[MI])/(mean(H(U),H(V))-E[MI])
h = 1 - H(C|K)/H(C)

Formula / how it is calculated: DBI = (1/k) Σ_i max_{j≠i} (s_i+s_j)/d(c_i,c_j)

Permutation Z-score of observed vs expected adjacency per cluster pair
Wall-clock seconds on fixed dataset & hardware
